{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032220070210BD26D0CC7B79080A0E"}"},"total":686},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7413757138095358782","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"题材挺好的，美食制作过程描述得很详细像菜谱一样，最大的缺点大概是人均美食家的发言让人很难有代入感，毕竟我吃到美食只会说：好吃！真好吃！特别好吃！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1726155498,"group_id":"7322401129013201982","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我只是喜欢听书📚我有厌蠢症","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nw3US2H6OQc1fsrzGQ7Z4ilKzcWqy7s8e/sFkZTMkNGK","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/862fe3dab7e246e3a9a5ae311452ac51~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776706526&x-signature=tcEuybRQErARoMUsueYmTtzVnAQ%3D","user_id":"4424055887496807","user_name":"希普顿书店"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4424055887496807","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7322401129013201982","book_info":{"abstract":"【美食治愈不生气，下饭好笑无女主，幕后群像笑哈哈】
天才厨师穿越到了一六旬老头身上并激活系统。
只要依靠厨艺治愈那些受伤的灵魂便能获得超凡奖励。
可系统第一道任务，居然让他治愈厌食症患者！

色泽鲜艳的西红柿炒蛋、汤汁浓郁的土豆炖牛肉、肉汁横流的千层牛肉馅儿饼。
以上不是食谱上的精美画卷，而是出自这老头的作品。
前世的顶级厨艺，配合系统的神级食材，一场美食盛宴已经展开。
......
呼叫呼叫，医院北门未发现爷爷踪迹，欧威儿。
呼叫呼叫，医院南门也没有发现异常，欧威儿。
呼叫！呼叫！在东门，爷爷来了，爷爷骑着三轮车带着美食走来了！

医院的厌食症患者，吃了我的饭，从此顿顿炫两大碗。
学校的厌学少年，吃了我的饭，剪去长发摘掉耳钉，奋发图强考入名校。
CBD的白领上班族，吃了我的饭，职场关系融洽平步青云。

这就是我，一个普通摆摊卖饭老头儿，却经常被误会是明星签售会现场的摆摊生活。
这碗爷爷牌盖浇饭，60年的厨艺，你顶得住么。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o850089356db7bd426aae71b20ccacde9~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"孙艺欣","author_id":"","book_id":"7322401129013201982","book_name":"爷爷随机摆摊，用美食治愈全世界","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#302020","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4569人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":90,"name":"天才","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=90&name=天才&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":78,"name":"美食","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=78&name=美食&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7322730743845634622","read_count":"4569","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1138682"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"516","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,穿越,美食,天才,无女主,无后宫,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/f391b891f9aa14b10ee2c59c12d89ec8~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779365222&x-signature=jWr3B414Jf9aJ6hRlM2VfD%2FddqE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3240987233878951","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"186"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032220070210BD26D0CC7B79080A0E"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读9小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":16579,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":33221,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":2888},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7395837746848138009","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看，就这么说吧这是我在看完林周那本之后能看下去的第一本美食文，情节搞笑幽默的同时没有那些乱七八糟的麻烦事，而且对美食的描写也很下饭，固定配角出场给我一种温馨的感觉，很好看的一本文，目前来说在我看完林周那本之后算上这本总的来说能看下去的也才两本，另一个是那个学校食堂卖卤味的，也挺好看（这本好久没看了因为当时就几十章，懒得等更新然后就忘了，现在又想起来了）"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1721980163,"group_id":"7322401129013201982","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nze8XpsI+10TC0TCyb53HCl2LffC8YkNnZfhytG9Xj80","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3309972086853408","user_name":"惊恐至极的秦璐璐"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3309972086853408","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7322401129013201982","book_info":{"abstract":"【美食治愈不生气，下饭好笑无女主，幕后群像笑哈哈】
